assertions.description: CSSFontFaceRule is exposed for inspecting @font-face descriptors.
font-variation-settings remains supported as the element-level property.
font-variation-settings inside @font-face is retained by CSSOM.
assertions.test: (()=>{const style=document.createElement('style');document.head.append(style);try{const sheet=style.sheet;sheet.insertRule('@font-face { font-family: "CPS FVS"; src: local("Arial"); font-variation-settings: "wght" 700; }');const rule=sheet.cssRules[0];return rule instanceof CSSFontFaceRule&&rule.style.getPropertyValue('font-variation-settings').includes('wght');}catch(e){return false;}finally{style.remove();}})()

assertions.description: font-variation-settings: normal is accepted as an @font-face descriptor value.
assertions.test: (()=>{const style=document.createElement('style');document.head.append(style);try{const sheet=style.sheet;sheet.insertRule('@font-face { font-family: "CPS FVS Normal"; src: local("Arial"); font-variation-settings: normal; }');const rule=sheet.cssRules[0];return rule.style.getPropertyValue('font-variation-settings').trim()==='normal';}catch(e){return false;}finally{style.remove();}})()

assertions.description: Multiple variation axes in an @font-face descriptor are preserved by CSSOM.
assertions.test: (()=>{const style=document.createElement('style');document.head.append(style);try{const sheet=style.sheet;sheet.insertRule('@font-face { font-family: "CPS FVS Axes"; src: local("Arial"); font-variation-settings: "wght" 600, "wdth" 80; }');const v=sheet.cssRules[0].style.getPropertyValue('font-variation-settings');return v.includes('wght')&&v.includes('wdth');}catch(e){return false;}finally{style.remove();}})()
